history.qwen_observation: Tests fail with InaccessibleObjectException because old Jackson and Mockito/catch-exception versions attempt reflective access to JDK internals (java.base/java.time) blocked in JDK 16+.
history.qwen_rationale: Replacing the direct Java 17 build upgrade with UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 triggers the Spring Boot 3 migration, which upgrades Jackson to 2.16+ and Mockito to 5.x, resolving JDK module reflection restrictions. The meta-recipe also handles the required Java 17 baseline and javax-to-jakarta namespace changes internally.

history.qwen_observation: Maven build failed because javax.validation:validation-api dependency lacks a version after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade removed its BOM management.
history.qwen_rationale: Spring Boot 3.x BOM manages jakarta.validation:jakarta.validation-api instead of javax.validation:validation-api. The explicit javax dependency without a version causes a Maven resolution failure. Forcing a version allows the build to proceed so the internal Jakarta migration recipe can convert it.

history.qwen_observation: The upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 step fails because javax.validation:validation-api is declared without a version, and Spring Boot 3's BOM no longer manages it, causing a Maven POM resolution error.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the obsolete javax.validation:validation-api dependency before the Spring Boot 3 upgrade prevents the missing version error. Spring Boot 3's migration recipes will automatically replace javax.validation usages with jakarta.validation, and the new BOM will manage the Jakarta dependency.

history.qwen_observation: Maven fails post-recipe at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 because javax.validation:validation-api is declared without a version, and Spring Boot 3's BOM no longer manages the legacy javax artifact.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting a POM_PATCH step to force a version on validation-api before the Spring Boot upgrade satisfies Maven's resolution requirements. This allows the UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe to execute successfully and subsequently migrate the dependency to the jakarta namespace.
